Pulegium minor, commonly known as Pennyroyal, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The health benefits of Pulegium minor include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and exhibit antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Pulegium minor include essential oils, particularly pulegone and menthone, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Pulegium minor include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to treat digestive issues, relieve menstrual cramps, and promote relaxation.
